CustomField.description: Due Date of the MR invoices to be calculated based on: 1) Fixed, OR 2) Relative based on Invoice Date. If Fixed selected, user must enter a value in the field MR Invoice Payment Due Day (Fixed). If Relative selected, user must enter a value in the field MR Invoice Payment Due Day (Relative).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Due Date of the MR invoices to be calculated based on either Fixed or Relative terms. If Fixed is selected, provide a value for 'MR Invoice Payment Due Day (Fixed)'. If Relative is selected, provide a value for 'MR Invoice Payment Due Day (Relative)'
CustomField.label: MR Invoice Payment Due Day Type

value.fullName: Relative - Based On Utilization Reporting Due Day
value.label: Relative - Based On Utilization Reporting Due Day
